cover: System architecture diagram: 'sf agent CLI for Headless Agentforce Automation'. Light grey background with faint grid. Dark bold header block 'sf agent CLI + Agentforce DX 2026'. Subtitle 'Generate specs, preview agents, run sessions, validate deployments without opening Setup'. Top-right: profile badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. LAYER 1 'Developer Workstation' (pastel blue): modules 'Agent Script .agent files', 'sf agent generate agent-spec', 'local lint + preview'. LAYER 2 'CI/CD Pipeline' (pastel green): modules 'scratch org deploy', 'sf agent preview', 'session regression tests'. LAYER 3 'Salesforce Runtime' (pastel orange): modules 'Agentforce 2.0', 'Atlas Reasoning Engine v2', 'AiAuthoringBundle metadata'. Central node 'Headless Agentforce DX' with rotating arrow, dotted directional connectors to all layers. INTEGRATION LAYER (upper right): '@salesforce/mcp' and 'MuleSoft API-to-MCP'. BOTTOM PANEL 'Governance Gates': sub-modules 'prompt policy', 'tool allowlist', 'audit logs' with flow arrows. Rounded rectangle containers, dotted arrowheads, micro vector icons, modern sans-serif fonts, publication-ready engineering diagram.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Agentforce Configuration as Source Code'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Agentforce Configuration as Source Code'. Subtitle 'Move agent behavior from browser-only edits to pull-request governance'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Reviewable .agent files with file-code icon', 'Deployable AiAuthoringBundle metadata with package icon', 'Repeatable sf agent CLI previews with terminal icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BROWSER-ONLY CHANGE' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'SOURCE-CONTROLLED AGENT' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: const agentChange = 'edited directly in production builder'; deployNotes.push('screenshot attached'); right column green border '// GOOD' code: export default { name: 'CaseResolutionAgent', guardrails: { requireCitationForKnowledge: true, maxToolCallsPerTurn: 5 } }; BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'PR review', 'CI preview', 'rollback ready'. Footer bar: 'If it changes runtime behavior, it belongs in source control.' Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'CI Gate for sf agent CLI Regression Tests'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'CI Gate for sf agent CLI Regression Tests'. Subtitle 'Block unsafe Agentforce changes before UAT or production'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Deploy metadata with sf project deploy start and rocket icon', 'Preview agent with sf agent preview and terminal icon', 'Assert sessions with sf agent sessions start and shield icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'NO REGRESSION GATE' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'AGENT CI GATE' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: sf agent preview --agent CaseResolutionAgent --input 'looks good?'; right column green border '// GOOD' code: npx tsx scripts/agent/run-agent-regression.ts && sf agent sessions end --session-id 0AGxx000000001BGAQ; BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'blocked phrases', 'tool call limit', 'approved citations'. Footer bar: 'Preview is not testing. Sessions are where governance starts.' Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
